summary: Iteration 14 testing complete. All 81 backend tests pass (100%) including 4 new tests for long-range VO fields. Frontend renders all 7 tabs correctly with new Camera/VO panel showing 5 stats (DET/INL/CONF/DIST/ERR). WebSocket telemetry streams all new VO fields. Docs tab Quick Start shows 8/8 system readiness checks.
passed_tests: Backend /api/camera returns new VO fields: vo_inlier_count, vo_confidence, vo_position_uncertainty, vo_total_distance - VERIFIED
Backend /api/mavlink returns MAVLink stats (state=CONNECTED, fc_type=QUADROTOR, vision_pos_sent) - VERIFIED
Backend /api/state returns telemetry data with roll/pitch/yaw/altitude/IMU/GPS/baro - VERIFIED
WebSocket /api/ws/telemetry streams data with camera containing all new VO fields - VERIFIED
Frontend Dashboard tab renders: 3D view, Drone Telemetry, sensor panels with MAV badges, Camera/VO panel with 5 stats - VERIFIED
Frontend Camera/VO tab shows 5 stats: DET, INL, CONF, DIST, ERR - VERIFIED
Frontend Docs tab Quick Start checklist shows 8/8 passing (JT-Zero Server, C++ Runtime, Camera, MAVLink, FC, VO, IMU, GPS) - VERIFIED
Frontend all 7 tabs render without console errors: Dashboard, Telemetry, Camera/VO, MAVLink, Events, Docs, Settings - VERIFIED
Frontend MAVLink tab shows FC info: ArduPilot, AP 4.5.0, QUADROTOR, TX/RX counters, CONNECTED - VERIFIED
All 81 pytest backend tests pass including 4 new VO field tests - VERIFIED
critical_code_review_comments: C++ camera.h VOResult struct includes new fields: inlier_count, confidence, position_uncertainty
native_bridge.py setdefault() properly provides defaults for new VO fields when C++ module lacks them
simulator.py CameraStats dataclass includes all new VO fields with proper initialization
CameraPanel.js displays 5 stats bar: DET (vo_features_detected), INL (vo_inlier_count), CONF (vo_confidence %), DIST (vo_total_distance), ERR (vo_position_uncertainty ±m)
LONG_RANGE_FLIGHT.md provides comprehensive ArduPilot param configuration for 5km VO-only flights

success_rate.backend: 100% - All 81 API tests pass (77 existing + 4 new VO field tests)
success_rate.frontend: 100% - All UI tests pass, all 7 tabs render correctly

context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 14 verified new long-range VO improvements: 1) /api/camera now returns 4 new fields: vo_inlier_count (median+MAD outlier rejection), vo_confidence (Kalman-filtered quality), vo_position_uncertainty (drift estimate in meters), vo_total_distance (path length in meters). 2) CameraPanel.js stats bar shows 5 metrics: DET/INL/CONF/DIST/ERR with color coding (green >60%, amber 30-60%, red <30%). 3) native_bridge.py provides setdefault() for new fields since C++ module may not have them yet. 4) LONG_RANGE_FLIGHT.md documents ArduPilot params for 5km VO-only flight. Total 81 backend tests pass. All 7 frontend tabs render correctly. WebSocket telemetry includes all new VO fields.

api_camera_new_fields: vo_inlier_count - Features remaining after median+MAD outlier rejection
vo_confidence - 0-1 Kalman-filtered confidence metric for EKF
vo_position_uncertainty - Accumulated drift estimate in meters
vo_total_distance - Total path traveled in meters
cpp_improvements_documented: Median + MAD outlier rejection in VO pipeline
